---
title: "Queensland Road Safety"
author: "Jacqueline Gunawan", 
        "Chung Yu Lin", 
        "Kai Aditya Sharma", 
        "Kai Hong Su"
format: 
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
bibliography: references.bib
---

```{r}
#| label: setup

# Load libraries here
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
```


# Executive Summary

Max 4 sentences


# Introduction

Max 10 sentences


# Methodology

Max 300 words

```{r}
#| label: fig-method-plot
#| fig-cap: "Caption for methodology figure."

# plot code 
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-method-table
#| tbl-cap: "Caption for methodology table."

# table code
```


# Results

Max 200 words

```{r}
#| label: fig-results-plot
#| fig-cap: "Caption for results figure."

# plot code
```


# Discussion, Conclusion and Recommendations

# References
